sigma.title: Container With A hostPath Mount Created

osquery.name: t1611_suid
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, username, groupname, permissions FROM suid_bin;

osquery.name: t1611_proc_priv
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, uid, gid FROM processes WHERE uid = 0 AND parent != 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery_matches.name: t1611_suid
osquery_matches.query_text: SELECT path, username, groupname, permissions FROM suid_bin;

osquery_matches.name: t1611_proc_priv
osquery_matches.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, uid, gid FROM processes WHERE uid = 0 AND parent != 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: S3 Silver (Linux Docker sandbox): 6 direct run(s) ran successfully, raw telemetry available, Sigma detection not confirmed (0/2 rules matched, 2 osquery).

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
